summary: Successfully tested the editable Service Date feature in Job Card Details modal. All functionality works correctly - edit mode activation, date change, save with success toast, cancel without saving, and data persistence.
critical_code_review_comments: Service Date inline editing implementation is well-structured with proper state management (editingServiceDate, editServiceDateValue)
handleEditServiceDate function correctly formats date for input (YYYY-MM-DD format)
handleSaveServiceDate function properly calls PUT /api/services/{id} endpoint and updates local state immediately
handleCancelServiceDateEdit function properly resets state without saving
UI shows edit icon (pencil) on hover indicating the date is clickable
Edit mode shows date picker with checkmark (save) and X (cancel) buttons
Success toast 'Service date updated successfully' appears after save
seed_data_creation: Modified service date for JOB-000326 (ID: 80c99824-f8d9-4a22-a4eb-4b24e9a7d518) to 2025-02-20 during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Editable Service Date feature in Job Card Details modal is fully working. Click on the date to edit, shows date picker with checkmark (save) and X (cancel) buttons. The service_date is updated via PUT /api/services/{id} endpoint. Data persists correctly in MongoDB.

features_tested: Navigate to Services -> Job Cards tab - PASSED
Click the eye icon to view a job card (open Job Card Details modal) - PASSED
Verify Service Date is displayed in the Job Card Information section - PASSED
Click on the Service Date - verify it becomes editable (date input appears) - PASSED
Change the service date to a new date - PASSED
Click the checkmark to save - verify success toast appears - PASSED
Verify the Service Date updates immediately in the modal - PASSED
Close the modal and re-open - verify the date change persisted (verified via API) - PASSED
Click cancel (X button) while editing - verify edit mode closes without saving - PASSED

ui_tests.edit_mode_activation: PASSED - date picker appears on click
ui_tests.save_functionality: PASSED - checkmark saves and shows toast 'Service date updated successfully'
ui_tests.cancel_functionality: PASSED - X button closes edit mode without saving
ui_tests.immediate_update: PASSED - Service Date updates immediately in modal after save
ui_tests.edit_icon_visibility: PASSED - Edit2 icon appears on hover
